g.text: Relative cost of gating mechanism (lower is better)

div.p: Trade-off: gates are baked at JIT time, so toggling telemetry needs a process restart. You choose what to observe at deployment time; the running process pays nothing for the rest. Lock-level telemetry flows through the same typed-event path (TyphonEvent.Emit*) — the old ChainedBlockAllocator<AccessOperations> lock-history (AccessControl.Telemetry.cs) is mid-migration.

g.text: static readonly == true → baseline emit cost
static mutable field → higher (no JIT fold)
